response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video for vocal music content. 2. Identified continuous instrumental background music with a narrator during the middle section. 3. Confirmed no singing or vocal songs are present. 4. Resolved that 'Fall in Grace' is the title of the live event, not a specific song title. 5. Mapped the scenes based on visual and content transitions.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional intro for an event titled 'Fall in Grace', featuring a story narration over instrumental music. No vocal songs were detected.

scenes.description: Static image of an anime-style character, titled 'Fall in Grace - Oura Kesuli Birthday Live 2026', with continuous instrumental background music.
Animated storyboard with text narration about the Heavenly, Human, and Demon Realms. Background music continues.
Transition back to the original static image with music.
